module.description: The name of the existing module

table.description: The table name for the model

moduleDisplayName.description: The display name for the module of the model

dataSource.description: The data source name of the model

modelEnableSoftDelete.description: This will indicate model has soft delete enabled

parentModel.description: The parent model name for the model

parentModule.description: The parent model name for the model

draftPublishWorkflowEnabled.description: Whether the draft publish workflow is enabled for the model

isLegacyTable.description: Indicates whether the table is a legacy table

items.description: JSON stringfied Metadata about a field

oneOf.description: JSON stringfied Metadata about a field

fields.description: The field metadata for fields for the model

generateChecksum.description: Whether to generate a checksum for the module
